title: Insolvency practitioner sanctions: Laurence Gerald Factor December 2024
body: "Summary of complaint  In terms of Regulation 5.33 of the ICAS Insolvency Regulations, notice is hereby given that the ICAS Authorisation Committee has applied a regulatory penalty of £7,500 to the Insolvency Practitioner Laurence Factor in respect of the following two issues:   Failure to hold estate funds in individual estate accounts, as required by Statement of Insolvency Practice 1; and Failure to investigate the validity and potential misuse of a Bounce Back Loan.   In calculating the level of penalty, the Committee consulted the Common Sanctions Guidance, which is shared by the Insolvency RPBs, and reached the following conclusions: "
